items.title: Why Guardiola's legacy could exceed the likes of Ferguson, Wenger, Klopp
items.summary: Exit as a Premier League champion like Sir Alex Ferguson? Or leave behind a strong foundation like Jurgen Klopp? Pep Guardiola has the chance to do both.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Todd Monken: Shedeur Sanders got more reps Tuesday, it will change each day
items.summary: The Browns did their first on-field work of the spring on Tuesday and the division of quarterback work was of particular interest during their minicamp practice.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: RR look to arrest their slide against struggling LSG
items.summary: Rajasthan Royals have lost their previous two games and Lucknow Super Giants their previous three
